title: Echo of the Heart
summary: After leaving the Chamber of Cycles, the Cyberkin becomes withdrawn and unstable. It keeps hearing echoes of its past selves — some corrupted, some lost. The player must take it to a quiet region of the Convergence Expanse, help it confront its fractured memories, and anchor its identity through resonance.
steps: Listen to your Cyberkin’s fragmented memories
Confront the Echo‑Kin (a manifestation of its past selves)
objectives: Listen to your Cyberkin’s fragmented memories
Confront the Echo‑Kin (a manifestation of its past selves)
